sentences.target: La sonnerie du réveil me fait sursauter.
sentences.reading: /la sɔnʁi dy ʁevɛj mə fɛ syʁsote/

translations.fr: La sonnerie du réveil me fait sursauter.
translations.ipa: /la sɔnʁi dy ʁevɛj mə fɛ syʁsote/
translations.en: The alarm's ring makes me jump.
translations.es: El timbre del despertador me sobresalta.
translations.de: Das Klingeln des Weckers lässt mich aufschrecken.
translations.it: La suoneria della sveglia mi fa sobbalzare.
translations.zh-Hans: 闹钟的铃声把我吓了一跳。
translations.pt: O toque do despertador me assusta.
translations.tr: Çalar saatin zili beni yerimden sıçratıyor.
translations.vi: Tiếng chuông báo thức làm tôi giật mình.
translations.nl: Het geluid van de wekker laat me schrikken.
translations.hi: अलार्म की घंटी मुझे चौंका देती है.
translations.el: Ο ήχος του ξυπνητηριού με κάνει να πεταχτώ.
translations.nb: Lyden av vekkerklokken får meg til å skvette.
translations.sv: Väckarklockans signal får mig att hoppa till.
translations.ro: Sunetul alarmei mă face să tresar.
translations.da: Vækkeurets ringning får mig til at fare sammen.
translations.ja: 目覚ましの音にびっくりする。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (feminine singular) functioning as determiner of 'sonnerie', marking a specific, identifiable noun (subject).
Common noun (feminine), head of the subject noun phrase; agrees in gender/number with 'La'.
Contracted preposition ('de' + 'le'); introduces the genitive/complement noun 'réveil' specifying the source/possessor of 'sonnerie'.
Common noun (masculine), object of the preposition 'du'; noun complement modifying 'sonnerie'.
Clitic personal pronoun (1st person singular), object of 'fait' in causative construction; marks the affected participant.
Main lexical verb (3rd person singular present), causative; subject is 'La sonnerie du réveil'; takes clitic object 'me' and infinitival complement 'sursauter'.
Infinitive verb functioning as non-finite complement (xcomp) to 'fait'; denotes the resulting action caused by the subject.

sentences.target: Change la sonnerie de ton téléphone.

translations.fr: Change la sonnerie de ton téléphone.
translations.es: Cambia el tono de llamada de tu teléfono.
translations.it: Cambia la suoneria del tuo telefono.
translations.pt: Muda o toque do seu celular.
translations.vi: Đổi nhạc chuông điện thoại của bạn.
translations.nl: Verander de beltoon van je telefoon.
translations.uk: Зміни мелодію дзвінка на своєму телефоні.
translations.el: Άλλαξε τον ήχο κλήσης του κινητού σου.
translations.ro: Schimbă tonul de apel al telefonului tău.
translations.ja: スマホの着信音を変えて。

tokens.explanation: Verb in imperative (2nd person singular) addressing the addressee; transitive with direct object 'la sonnerie de ton téléphone'.
Definite article (feminine singular) determiner of 'sonnerie'.
Common noun (feminine), direct object of 'Change'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement ('ton téléphone') that specifies possession/source of 'sonnerie'.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular, masculine singular), modifying 'téléphone'.
Common noun (masculine), object of the preposition 'de' within the noun phrase complement.

sentences.target: On attend la sonnerie pour entrer.

translations.fr: On attend la sonnerie pour entrer.
translations.en: We're waiting for the bell to go in.
translations.es: Esperamos a que suene el timbre para entrar.
translations.de: Wir warten auf das Klingeln, bevor wir hineingehen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们等铃声响了再进去。
translations.yue: 我哋等鐘聲响咗先入去。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đợi chuông reo rồi mới vào.
translations.nl: We wachten op de bel om naar binnen te gaan.
translations.hi: हम अंदर जाने के लिए घंटी का इंतज़ार करते हैं.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε το κουδούνι για να μπούμε.
translations.nb: Vi venter på ringeklokka før vi går inn.
translations.id: Kami menunggu bel berbunyi untuk masuk.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på ringningen innan vi går in.
translations.ro: Așteptăm să sune clopoțelul ca să intrăm.
translations.cs: Čekáme na zvonek, abychom mohli vejít.
translations.da: Vi venter på klokken, før vi går ind.
translations.fi: Odotamme kellon soittoa πριν kuin menemme sisään.
translations.ja: 入る前にチャイムが鳴るのを待つ。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/collective subject pronoun; syntactic subject of 'attend'.
Main verb (3rd person singular present, agreeing with 'on'); transitive here, taking direct object 'la sonnerie'.
Definite article (feminine singular) determiner of 'sonnerie'.
Common noun (feminine), direct object of 'attend'.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause with the infinitive 'entrer'.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'pour' (purpose).

sentences.target: Je coupe la sonnerie en réunion.

translations.fr: Je coupe la sonnerie en réunion.
translations.en: I silence the ringtone in meetings.
translations.es: Silencio el tono de llamada en las reuniones.
translations.de: Ich schalte den Klingelton in Besprechungen stumm.
translations.it: Silenzio la suoneria durante le riunioni.
translations.zh-Hans: 开会时我把铃声调成静音。
translations.yue: 開會嗰陣我會將鈴聲設為靜音。
translations.pt: Eu silencio o toque nas reuniões.
translations.vi: Trong các cuộc họp tôi tắt tiếng nhạc chuông.
translations.nl: In vergaderingen zet ik de beltoon uit.
translations.hi: बैठकों में मैं रिंगटोन को साइलेंट कर देता हूँ.
translations.el: Στις συσκέψεις βάζω τον ήχο κλήσης σε σίγαση.
translations.nb: I møter setter jeg ringetonen på lydløs.
translations.id: Saat rapat saya bisukan nada dering.
translations.sv: På möten sätter jag ringsignalen på ljudlöst.
translations.ro: La ședințe pun tonul de apel pe silențios.
translations.da: Til møder sætter jeg ringetonen på lydløs.
translations.ja: 会議では着信音を消音にする。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person singular); subject of 'coupe'.
Main verb (1st person singular present); transitive, taking 'la sonnerie' as direct object.
Definite article (feminine singular) determiner of 'sonnerie'.
Common noun (feminine), direct object of 'coupe'.
Preposition introducing a circumstantial complement indicating context/setting ('réunion').
Common noun (feminine), object of the preposition 'en'; denotes the setting in which the action occurs.

Je coupe la sonnerie en réunion.
